metadata.description: Snowiki-owned product retrieval regression queries. This is a regression contract, not a public benchmark replacement.
bias_controls: Avoid exact-match-only coverage by mixing paraphrase, temporal, topical, source/provenance, and identifier-heavy questions.
Avoid synthetic overfit by anchoring documents in existing fixture and architecture contracts.
Keep hard negatives visible through tags and distractor documents.

queries.text: Snowiki가 지식을 축적하는 개인 위키라는 설명은 어디에서 확인할 수 있나?
qmd 검색을 Bash 도구 호출로 실행한 세션 증거를 찾아줘
민감정보 차단과 secret redaction 판단 근거가 들어 있는 자료는?
어제 한국어 검색과 mixed query retrieval 작업은 어떤 세션에 남아 있나?
source root, raw snapshot, normalized record, compiled page를 구분하는 근거 문서를 찾아줘
Which contract says Korean analyzer gains are not enough to change the default tokenizer?
Where is the command that evaluates an existing benchmark report against analyzer gates documented?
Find the canonical benchmark gold labels file, not the session that edited the labels
Which architecture note explains RuntimeCorpusDocument conversion into BM25 documents?
Which OpenCode fixture records compaction and continuation work on 2026-04-05?
mixed language retrieval에서 한국어와 English query를 같이 다루는 overview 문서
snowiki benchmark --target bm25_regex_v1 --report 사용법이 있는 benchmark 문서
오늘 index building과 blended results 작업을 다룬 session은?
design-notes.md와 queries.csv attachment가 있는 benchmark planning session
BM25SearchIndex tokenizer cache serialization search results 구현 파일
build_retrieval_snapshot workspace records pages snapshot helper
source provenance fields source_type normalized compiled index cache layers
snowiki benchmark-gate --report analyzer gate existing benchmark JSON
2026-04-05에 continuation carry-over context로 이어진 세션 기록
privacy test fake API key fixture는 analyzer promotion 문서가 아니라 어디에 있나?
